title: PRAMIRACETAM
description: Pramiracetam is one of the most potent racetams, approximately 15-30x stronger than piracetam. It's particularly noted for enhancing long-term memory formation and high-affinity choline uptake, making it popular for learning and studying.

research.title: Pramiracetam effects on scopolamine-induced amnesia in healthy volunteers
research.summary: Study examined pramiracetam's ability to counteract memory loss induced by scopolamine in healthy male volunteers, showing pramiracetam partly reduced amnesic effects compared to placebo.

research.title: Pharmacokinetics of oral pramiracetam in normal volunteers
research.summary: Study assessed pramiracetam's pharmacokinetics in healthy male volunteers receiving varying doses, demonstrating predictable absorption and clearance rates without significant side effects.

research.title: Placebo-controlled study of pramiracetam in young males with memory and cognitive problems resulting from head injury and anoxia
research.summary: Found that 400 mg pramiracetam sulphate taken three times daily significantly improved memory, particularly delayed recall, in males with brain injuries versus placebo.

research.title: A new one-trial test for neurobiological studies of memory in rats. Effects of piracetam and pramiracetam
research.summary: Study assessed nootropic effects on rats' recognition memory using exploratory behavior tests. Specific pramiracetam doses significantly improved object recognition after 24 hours.

research.title: Some neurochemical properties of pramiracetam (CI-879), a new cognition-enhancing agent
research.summary: Investigated pramiracetam's neurochemical effects and found it significantly increased choline uptake in the hippocampus, suggesting cognitive enhancement through boosted acetylcholine turnover.

sentiment.summary: Highly regarded for memory enhancement and studying. Users report significant improvements in recall and learning. Less emotional effect than aniracetam.

effects.label: Highly Potent:
effects.description: Effective at much lower doses than piracetam.

effects.label: Consistent:
effects.description: Reliable cognitive enhancement for most users.

effects.label: Choline Demanding:
effects.description: Requires adequate choline more than other racetams.

dosage.label: With Fats:
dosage.description: Fat-soluble; best absorbed with dietary fat.

dosage.label: Choline Essential:
dosage.description: Must supplement choline to avoid headaches.

availability.label: Prescription in Europe:
availability.description: Available by prescription in some countries.

availability.label: Higher Cost:
availability.description: More expensive than piracetam due to potency.
